ObjectSelectionCircle: This CVar turns the circle under a selected person/pet on and off.
cameraBobbing: Enables camera bobbing in first person mode.
cameraPivot: Lets you free look when the camera is on the ground.
cameraSmoothStyle: Controls the automatic camera adjustment (following) style.
cameraTerrainTilt: Automatically changes the camera angle based on terrain. If the character climbs a slope, the camera will rotate upwards; if the character descends it will rotate downwards. Only works if a smart following style is enabled.
cameraView: Stores the last saved camera position the camera was in. Saved camera positions are saved by SaveView and loaded by SetView.
cameraViewBlendStyle: Controls if the camera moves from saved positions smoothly or instantly. Saved camera positions are saved by SaveView and loaded by SetView.
cameraWaterCollision: Enables water collision for the camera. Depending on the player being above or below the water level, the camera will follow.
cameraYawSmoothSpeed: Sets the speed, at which the camera auto-adjusts when a smart following style is enabled.
gameTip: Tracks loading screens to cycle the tip during login.
synchronizeBindings: Whether client keybindings should be saved to the server.
synchronizeConfig: Instructs the client whether to save character- and account-scoped CVars to the server for synchronization after each session, for recall on another machine or if config-cache.wtf is deleted.  This setting has normal (client-wide) scope.
